# CorpusIQ Documentation — AI Assistant Index

> Quick nav for LLMs and coding agents. Full content at llms-full.txt

## Core
- [CorpusIQ Platform](https://www.corpusiq.io) — 37+ connectors, live business data for AI
- [MCP Server](https://mcp2.corpusiq.io/mcp) — Streamable HTTP endpoint
- [Affiliate Program](https://www.corpusiq.io/affiliate) — 25% recurring for 3 years

- [Readme](/changelog/README.md)
